metadata.seed: It's my birthday today And I didn't think I'd have made it this far without this sub. Thank you.

patient.query: It's my birthday today And I didn't think I'd have made it this far without this sub. Thank you.

llm_response.response: Happy birthday! 🎉 I’m so glad you’re here and that this sub has been a part of your journey—your presence truly makes it special. Wishing you a day filled with joy, laughter, and all the good vibes you deserve!
